heading: Regulations
label: 5115 Regulations
text: The Office of Personnel Management may prescribe regulations necessary for the administration of this chapter, except sections 5109 and 5114.1See References in Text note below.1
notes: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large .5 U.S.C. 1072, .Oct. 28, 1949, ch. 782, § 110163 Stat. 971 .5 U.S.C. 1072a, .Sept. 1, 1954, ch. 1208, § 11368 Stat. 1108Former sections 1072 and 1072a are combined and restated for clarity. The remainder of the authority is carried into sections 3324, 5338, and 7154.Standard changes are made to conform with the definitions applicable and the style of this title as outlined in the preface to the report.
